\begin{frame}{Special Environments I}
    \begin{block}{Block}
        This is an example of a block.
    \end{block}
    \begin{alertblock}{Alert}
        This is an example of an alert.
    \end{alertblock}
    \begin{example}[Example Name]
        This is an example of an example.
    \end{example}
    \begin{theorem}[Theorem Name]
        This is an example of a theorem. Following is an equation.
        \begin{equation*}
            a^2 + b^2 = c^2.
        \end{equation*}
    \end{theorem}
\end{frame}

\begin{frame}
    \frametitle{Special Environments II}
    \begin{lemma}[Lemma Name]
    This is an example of a lemma.
    \end{lemma}
    \begin{corollary}[Corollary Name]
        This is an example of a corollary.
    \end{corollary}
    \begin{definition}[Definition Name]
        This is an example of a definition.
    \end{definition}
    \begin{proof}[Proof Name]
        This is an example of a proof.
    \end{proof}
\end{frame}
